Moon
with Rahu (the door keeper). The fa
ther will hold a low Government job.
Dt Yen. In the seco~d house, therefore, Mars
and Mercury are posited together. Sat
Sat. Sun
urn and' Jupiter (Life and Profession)
Jupt Dh.
are behind Ketu and so are not strong.
Mars Jupiter is in debilitation, Venus. in
Mer. Cancer. Venus is placed in Mother's
sign. So the mother may not have
much love for the son. The Moon is in exaltation in Taurus. This shows the
native having lived for about I7 to I9 years at a place different from where
he was born. In the present life his yoga begins at 20. In his last birth he was
short lived; but in this birth he will be long lived. With Saturn adjoining Ketu,
and aspected by inimical Venus, the native will be poisoned. The dispositions
of the Moon, Jupiter and Saturn and the order in which they are placed shows
the native to be a lover of old traditions. Everything will be good after his sins
are washed.
